section.title: Daemons and Configuration
section.para:
This server can be launched directly from the command line:
$ VWS_HOST=0.0.0.0 VWS_PORT=9090 VWS_THREADS=4 ./my_server
Or managed by a process supervisor as described in the Service Management section.

section.title: RPC Server
section.para: Clients can call into this server using the client-side RPC API. For example, to call the user.login function, a client would create a message with the header "id" set to "user.login", include the required credentials as headers, and use vrtql_rpc_exec() or vrtql_rpc_invoke() to make the call.

section.title: A Simple Message Broker
